title: No way to distinguish between multiple similar automations - Need ability to name them or provide a face up description
excerpt:
I have multiple automations that do very similar things (e.g Every week, create an item).  On occasion, I need to update one (or multiple) but I have to open every one to identify the correct one. 
Can you provide a way …

posts.author: Jhilbert64 (Jeff Hilbert)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have multiple automations that do very similar things (e.g Every week, create an item). On occasion, I need to update one (or multiple) but I have to open every one to identify the correct one.

Can you provide a way to name them or provide a face up description so we can tell what the automation is at a glance on the main automations page.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Jhilbert64!

There is a dedicated recipe description at the top of each automation recipe here:

Screen Shot 2023-03-22 at 12.28.58 pm1145×133 13.4 KB

Is this along the lines of what you’re looking for?

posts.author: Jhilbert64 (Jeff Hilbert)
posts.cookedHtml:
HOW DID I MISS THAT!?!?!?!?!
OMG!!

Yes, that is exactly what I was looking for.
Thank you!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: No problem at all!
